title: Knowledge Base System
description: Build a Knowledge Base System with the NocoBase no-code platform for articles, categories, and navigation.
description_cn: 通过 NocoBase 无代码平台搭建团队知识库，管理文章内容和分类导航。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Knowledge Base System: circular category cards with search-driven show/hide. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/05-knowledge-base.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 知识库:圆形分类卡片,随搜索显示/隐藏。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/05-knowledge-base.html
featureList: Circular category cards with search-driven show/hide
about:
knowledge base
